description: Prior exposure for starter HR expectancy post-processor. Slot weights are mean PAs vs starting pitcher by batting-order slot (1=leadoff). Heuristic top-heavy spread scaled to mean_bf; replace with Statcast-derived values when bulk historical path is wired.
notes: mean_pa_vs_starter_by_slot has length 9; index 0 = lineup slot 1.
Values sum to mean_bf (total expected PAs vs starter across the nine slots).
When official lineups are supplied (see gen_pitcher_expected_hr.py), slot s uses weight[s-1] with batter at that slot.
